title: Arconia
description: Arconia is a fresh, and very colorful take on automated resource generation with a magic theme
body:
Instead of chasing rainbows in a vain attempt to find a pot of gold at the end, why not wield the power of magic to build one yourself with much greater rewards? Forget the gold, you will be able to automatically extract much better treasure!

A notebook, left behind by a traveller long gone, describes in detail various rituals to be performed that will help you construct the pot, and progress through seven stages. Each stage is represented by a color of the rainbow, and will unlock more treasure at an ever-increasing rate. Once unlocked, all you have to do is to provide storage to collect the loot.

As common wisdom will tell you, no good magic-themed mod can do without some ritual involving a circle of pedestals. Thus, one is included here for you, with a staff included of course. Through the ritual, you learn how to retrieve specific items from the pot of gold.

Integration with JEI is available for all recipes, including the custom crafting ritual, for your convenience.

For modpack integrators: All treasure, and custom crafting ritual recipes, can be configured through datapacks. Configuration is available to tune the treasure generation rate.
